name_jp_rom: Asaruto Burakku Fezā - Amagakure no Sayo
name_jp_tl: Assault Black Feather - Sayo the Rain Hider
desc:
1 Tuner + 1 non-Tuner monster
If this card is Synchro Summoned using a "Blackwing" monster as Material, it is treated as a Tuner while face-up on the field. Twice per turn, this card cannot be destroyed by battle.
mnst_eff:

action: Gains effects if Synchro Summoned using specific Synchro Material
